parameters.jsonBody: {"command": "docker exec n8n-envision-postgres-1 psql -U n8n -d n8n -t -A -F'|' -c \"SELECT 'learnings' as t, count(*) FROM gda_learning_log UNION ALL SELECT 'decisions', count(*) FROM gda_decision_memory UNION ALL SELECT 'content', count(*) FROM gda_content_store UNION ALL SELECT 'interactions', count(*) FROM gda_interaction_log UNION ALL SELECT 'patterns', count(*) FROM gda_pattern_library WHERE active=true;\""}
